name: LxveOS
description: LxveAce security-panel OS (ESP-IDF): headless/GUI esp_console control surface — passive WiFi/BLE recon + defensive detectors, EAPOL/PMKID capture, an arm-gated offensive set, and the LXVEOS/1 serial event bridge. Per-board merged single .bin (flashed at 0x0). Authorized/defensive use.
note: Aligned to LxveAce/lxveos (PRIVATE). Tracks the rolling `ci-latest` GitHub PRERELEASE build channel: the github_release resolver hits the /releases/tags/ci-latest endpoint (not /releases/latest, which excludes prereleases). Each board ships one `<board_id>-merged.bin` (idf.py merge-bin embeds bootloader+partition-table+app), flashed at a single offset 0x0 — no separate bootloader/partition side-files. protocol=lxveos wires the LxveOSProtocol serial parser post-flash (LXVEOS/1 status/event framing). Boards: bare_esp32_headless / cyd_2432S028_classic / m5stickc_plus2 (esp32), m5cardputer_v1 / jc3248w535_s3_qspi (esp32s3). NOTE: LxveAce/lxveos is private, so the ci-latest asset download needs an authenticated GitHub token — until the channel is public, flash via an authenticated `gh release download ci-latest --repo LxveAce/lxveos` or a local source. Flash write is owner-gated until Stage-5 HARDWARE-CLAIMS validation.
label: LxveOS (LxveAce)
